title: viola rugulosa
intro: Viola rugulosa, also known as yellow violet or small yellow violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola rugulosa include treating various ailments such as fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Viola rugulosa include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
